Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[奈良県]][[斑鳩町]]内にある[[Building]]sに関するカテゴリ。
{{デフォルトソート:いかるかちようのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|いかるかちようのけんちくふつ}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|ja|Category:斑鳩町の建築物|comment=cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}} {{translated page|ja|Category:斑鳩町の建築物|version=61571614}}
[[ja:Category:斑鳩町の建築物]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Tatsuta Shrine (Nara)]] [[Category:categories missing wikidata]]
